title: Egg Cobblemon
description: A vanilla plus modpack with Cobblemon as its base!
body:
This modpack is made to capture the beauty of vanilla with some nice new additions and optimisations!

Enjoy new additions such as furniture and pokemon!

Explore a vanilla world with new sounds and atmosphere!

Run the game smoothly with the carefully picked optimisation mods!

Get ready to have a whole heap of fun playing this Cobblemon pack!
